indicators.name: Checkered floor
indicators.rationale: The checkered floor may be slippery and uncomfortable for yoga practice.

indicators.name: Dining table
indicators.rationale: The dining table is too large and obstructs the space needed for yoga.

indicators.name: Cabinets
indicators.rationale: The cabinets are too high and may obstruct the view during yoga.

reasoning_summary: The space is somewhat suitable for yoga due to the presence of natural light and the absence of large furniture, but the checkered floor and high cabinets could be problematic.
